channel.title: Cognition on The Cogitating Ceviche
channel.description: Recent content in Cognition on The Cogitating Ceviche

item.title: Nikola Tesla: When Vision Could Not Become Institution
item.description:
The Cogitating Ceviché is a . , . nowHe saw electrical futures before most men could describe them, but he could not turn invention into durable control over capital, credit, or legacy.The InsightNikola Tesla did not fail because his mind was small….

Read the full article on Substack

item.title: The Cognitive Glasses We Didn’t Know We Needed
item.description:
There are conversations we forget five minutes after they happen, and then there are the ones that lodge in the cerebral cortex like a grain of sand under a pearl. Recently, I overheard someone wondering aloud whether AI might someday help people…

Read the full article on Substack

item.title: Cogitating Ceviche’s Week in Review (25-47)
item.description:
The Cogitating Ceviché is a . , .Editorial SummaryThis week’s collection from the minds of Calista F. Freiheit, Conrad T. Hannon, Conrad Hannon, and Gio Marron traverses realms both literal and literary—from the collapse of trust in expertise to the…

item.title: Valor and Recognition:
item.description:
The Cogitating Ceviché is a . , . nowI. Gratitude and AccountabilityEvery Veterans Day, the nation pauses to say thank you. Parades pass, flags rise, and words of gratitude echo across the country. Yet gratitude without accountability is incomplete….
